# VibePro

VibePro is a repository-local control plane for evidence-backed, safe delivery by AI coding agents.

Canonical manual: https://vibepro.pages.dev/
Source: https://github.com/Unson-LLC/vibepro
License: Apache-2.0

Start here:
- https://vibepro.pages.dev/guide/what-is-vibepro
- https://vibepro.pages.dev/guide/control-loop
- https://vibepro.pages.dev/guide/safety-model
- https://vibepro.pages.dev/guide/release-and-audit
- https://vibepro.pages.dev/reference/cli

Japanese:
- https://vibepro.pages.dev/ja/guide/what-is-vibepro
- https://vibepro.pages.dev/ja/guide/control-loop
- https://vibepro.pages.dev/ja/guide/safety-model
- https://vibepro.pages.dev/ja/guide/release-and-audit
- https://vibepro.pages.dev/ja/reference/cli

The public manual intentionally excludes repository-internal Story, Architecture, Spec, contract, and runtime evidence corpora. The running CLI and current-head artifacts remain authoritative for command and gate decisions.
